name: Honey Wheat Berry Bread for the Zojirushi
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure milk, honey, shortening, salt, ginger, bread flour, wheat flour, and cracked wheat into the baking pan.
2. Tap the container firmly to level out the ingredients and sprinkle yeast in the center.
3. Insert the pan securely into the baking unit and close the lid.
4. Select BASIC WHITE BREAD setting and LIGHT baking degree setting.
5. Press START.
6. The COMPLETE light will flash when bread is done.
7. Using hot pads, remove the baking pan from the unit and pull out the kneading rod.
8. Turn off the appliance and turn out the dough onto a cooling rack.
9. Allow to cool before slicing.
